channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Is bovine colostrum truly 'liquid gold' for gut health?
item.description: Baby calves rely on it for immunity and gut health. Now marketers promote it for humans. Here's what scientists say.

item.title: Confirmed Ebola cases in Congo reach 282 as survivors share recovery stories
item.description: The outbreak remains centered in Congo's eastern Ituri province. Congo has reported over 1,000 suspected cases with the Bundibugyo virus, which has no ...

item.title: Morning news summary
item.description: Israel expands its Lebanon offensive as U.S.-Iran peace talks stall, Congress returns with a busy agenda, and court rulings create new hurdles for Trump.

item.title: U.S. civil rights agency dismantles anti-discrimination tools one by one
item.description: The EEOC seeks to overturn decades-old rules aimed at tackling employment discrimination. The Trump administration says those rules have led to...
